page.primary_keyword: Marbella stag weekend yacht charter itinerary
page.title: Ultimate Stag Weekend Yacht Charter Itinerary in Marbella

data.meta_description: Plan the ultimate Marbella stag weekend yacht charter itinerary. 12-hour luxury boat trip from Puerto Banús with jet skis, lunch, and nightlife. Book now.
data.summary: This page outlines a complete 12-hour stag weekend yacht charter itinerary in Marbella, featuring a Mangusta 80 from Puerto Banús, jet ski thrills, beach stops, and VIP nightlife. It includes concrete pricing, route details, and booking tips for a seamless celebration.
key_facts: Mangusta 80 (24m) fits 12 guests and departs from Puerto Banús.
Minimum 4-hour charter at €4,719 includes a free jet ski.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Typical stag itinerary: 12:00 boarding, jet ski session, lunch at sea, beach stop, sunset cruise.
Customizable route: Marbella Marina, Cabopino, Estepona, or Sotogrande.
No hidden fees: price includes skipper, fuel, and standard bar.
Extra jet skis, water toys, and catering available on request.
Evening transfer to Ocean Club or Pangea included on request.

faq.q: How do I book a stag weekend yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We’ll confirm the boat (e.g., Mangusta 80), date, and any extras like jet skis or catering. A deposit secures the booking; balance is due 48 hours before departure.

faq.q: What is included in the Mangusta 80 stag charter?
faq.a: The €4,719 minimum 4-hour charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and a free jet ski. Extra hours or jet skis are available on request.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.a: Yes, you’re welcome to bring your own food and drinks. The standard bar is included, but for a full catering package (e.g., paella, barbecue, sushi), let us know in advance—we can arrange it at an additional cost.

faq.q: What is the best time of year for a stag weekend yacht charter?
faq.a: May to October offers the best weather, with sea temperatures above 20°C and calm waters. July and August are peak season; book at least two weeks ahead. April and November can work but are cooler and windier.

faq.q: How many guests can the Mangusta 80 accommodate?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 officially carries up to 12 guests. For a stag group of 10–12, it’s ideal. Larger groups can charter multiple boats from our fleet, such as the Ferretti 94 (29m) or Canados 86 (26m).

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe (e.g., high winds or storms), we’ll offer a full refund or reschedule at no extra cost. Light drizzle or moderate swell rarely cancels trips, but safety comes first.

faq.q: Can we extend the charter into the evening?
faq.a: Yes, the Mangusta 80 can be booked for up to 12 hours. An evening extension includes sunset cruising and a return to Puerto Banús around 22:00, with direct access to nightclubs like Ocean Club or Pangea.

faq.q: Is the jet ski included for all stag groups?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 charter includes one free jet ski. Additional jet skis can be added for €300/hour each. All riders must hold a valid license or be accompanied by an instructor (available on request).

data.body_html:
Marbella is the undisputed king of stag weekends in Europe, and nothing says “best man’s triumph” like a private yacht charter from Puerto Banús. This Marbella stag weekend yacht charter itinerary packs 12 hours of sun, speed, and style aboard the Mangusta 80 — a 24-metre open sports yacht that turns heads at every marina. With a free jet ski included from the €4,719 minimum 4-hour rate, your group gets maximum value without hidden fees. From midday boarding to late-night clubbing, here’s exactly how to run the perfect stag.

Why Choose a Yacht Charter for a Stag Weekend in Marbella?

A yacht gives you total privacy, flexibility, and a floating party base. Unlike crowded beach clubs, your group of up to 12 guests controls the music, the route, and the pace. The Mangusta 80’s triple 1,550 hp engines hit 30+ knots, so you cover serious ground between Costa del Sol hotspots. Plus, all charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA — no surprises. For a stag, the free jet ski alone saves €300–400 compared to renting separately on the beach.

Check our main boat rental page for full fleet details and instant WhatsApp booking.

The Perfect 12-Hour Stag Itinerary

This itinerary balances adrenaline, relaxation, and nightlife. It’s fully customisable, but here’s the blueprint that works for 90% of stag groups.

12:00 – Boarding at Puerto Banús

Meet your skipper at the Mangusta 80, moored in Puerto Banús. The crew loads your drinks and snacks while you get a safety briefing. Departure is prompt — don’t be late. The marina’s glamour sets the tone: superyachts, designer shops, and the famous Casino Marbella in view.

12:30 – Jet Ski Session off Cabopino

Head east 15 minutes to the calm waters off Cabopino dunes. The included jet ski goes out first. Rotate in pairs — each rider gets 15–20 minutes. The skipper can also tow a ringo or wakeboard if you book extras. By 13:30, everyone’s buzzing and ready for lunch.

13:30 – Lunch at Sea near Cala del Faro

Anchor in the sheltered cove of Cala del Faro, just west of Marbella. The crew serves a barbecue or paella (pre-ordered, €35–45/head). Drinks flow: beer, white wine, cava, and soft drinks are included. The water is calm, the sun is high, and the DJ plays from the boat’s sound system.

15:30 – Beach Stop at Cala Cortés

Motors off, swim stop at Cala Cortés — a pebble beach with crystal-clear water. Snorkel masks and noodles are on board. This is the photo-op spot: the Mangusta 80 anchored against the Sierra Blanca backdrop. Stay for an hour, then cruise back toward Puerto Banús.

17:00 – Sunset Cruise along the Golden Mile

As the sun drops behind La Concha mountain, cruise slowly past the Golden Mile mansions. The skipper can point out Marbella Club, Puente Romano, and the King’s palace. Drinks are refilled, and the mood shifts to pre-party mode. Arrive back at Puerto Banús around 18:00.

18:30 – VIP Entry at Ocean Club or Pangea

Disembark and walk straight to Ocean Club (5 minutes) or Pangea (10 minutes). We can arrange VIP table bookings with bottle service and guest list entry. Most stag groups book a table for 10–12, costing €1,500–2,500 depending on drinks. The night continues until 03:00.

Which Boat is Best for a Stag Weekend?

For a stag group of 10–12, the Mangusta 80 is the top choice: 24 metres, open deck layout, sun pads, and a free jet ski. If your group is smaller (8–9 guests), the Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m) offers a flybridge lounge and similar speed. For larger groups, the Ferretti 94 (29m) or Canados 86 (26m) can host 12 guests with more cabin space. All depart from Puerto Banús.

See our full yacht charter fleet for specs and pricing on other boats.

What’s Included and What Costs Extra?

Included in €4,719 (4h Mangusta 80)Extra cost (on request)
Licensed skipperAdditional jet skis (€300/h each)
Fuel for the charterFull catering (paella, BBQ, sushi)
Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cavaVIP table at Ocean Club/Pangea
Light snacks (chips, nuts, olives)Photographer/videographer
Insurance and safety equipmentExtra hours (€1,050/hour)
Free jet ski (1 unit)Transfer to/from hotel (€50–100)
21% IVA (Spanish VAT)Custom decorations or banners

How to Book Your Stag Weekend Yacht Charter

Booking is straightforward: contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and any extras. We’ll confirm availability and send a payment link for a 50% deposit. The balance is due 48 hours before departure. For peak summer weekends (June–August), book at least three weeks ahead. Cancellations made 14+ days before get a full refund; within 7 days, 50%.

We also offer multi-day charters for extended stag weekends — just ask. For more inspiration, read our Marbella stag weekend yacht charter itinerary guide.

Alternative Routes for a Stag Weekend

If you want a change of scenery, these routes work well:

  • Estepona & Selwo Marina – 30 minutes west, quieter beaches, dolphin spotting.
  • Sotogrande & La Duquesa – 45 minutes west, luxury marina lunch, less crowded.
  • Marbella Marina & Cabopino – 20 minutes east, sand dunes, beach clubs.
  • Benalmádena & Torremolinos – 40 minutes east, lively promenade, jet ski hire.

All routes can be tailored to your group’s vibe — just tell your skipper.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a stag weekend yacht charter in Marbella?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We’ll confirm the boat (e.g., Mangusta 80), date, and any extras like jet skis or catering. A deposit secures the booking; balance is due 48 hours before departure.

What is included in the Mangusta 80 stag charter?

The €4,719 minimum 4-hour charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and a free jet ski. Extra hours or jet skis are available on request.

Can I bring my own food and drinks?

Yes, you’re welcome to bring your own food and drinks. The standard bar is included, but for a full catering package (e.g., paella, barbecue, sushi), let us know in advance—we can arrange it at an additional cost.

What is the best time of year for a stag weekend yacht charter?

May to October offers the best weather, with sea temperatures above 20°C and calm waters. July and August are peak season; book at least two weeks ahead. April and November can work but are cooler and windier.

How many guests can the Mangusta 80 accommodate?

The Mangusta 80 officially carries up to 12 guests. For a stag group of 10–12, it’s ideal. Larger groups can charter multiple boats from our fleet, such as the Ferretti 94 (29m) or Canados 86 (26m).

What happens if the weather is bad?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe (e.g., high winds or storms), we’ll offer a full refund or reschedule at no extra cost. Light drizzle or moderate swell rarely cancels trips, but safety comes first.

Can we extend the charter into the evening?

Yes, the Mangusta 80 can be booked for up to 12 hours. An evening extension includes sunset cruising and a return to Puerto Banús around 22:00, with direct access to nightclubs like Ocean Club or Pangea.

Is the jet ski included for all stag groups?

The Mangusta 80 charter includes one free jet ski. Additional jet skis can be added for €300/hour each. All riders must hold a valid license or be accompanied by an instructor (available on request).

Ready to plan the ultimate stag weekend? Contact us via WhatsApp to reserve your Mangusta 80 or any other boat from our fleet. Your skipper, jet ski, and VIP night out are waiting.
